problem: Why does acute pain become chronic in some people — what neural change occurs?
mechanism: Stem cell differentiation into target tissue type
hypothesis: The key to Why does acute pain become chronic in some people — what neural change occurs? is Stem cell differentiation into target tissue type — specifically Stem cell differentiation — which would help 50,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: In vitro cell culture assay with 36 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
